Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

**Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Split-stack: Python FastAPI/WebSocket backend (physics, mass balance, control loops) + HTML/CSS/JS frontend (DCS mimic). Build strictly ONE UNIT at a time; do not anticipate or code downstream units until instructed.

**Rev 2 design (locked, controlling):** Abandon hand-drawn SVG stream recreation. Use the actual cleaned DCS screenshot as the UI background (`screen` `background-image`); overlay live transmitter values on top at the image's pixel coordinates. Alignment problem vanishes because streams are now image pixels. Locked AskUserQuestion answers: background = "Clean screenshots after removing the values of the transmitters that was recorded on the screenshots" (erase baked static values → blank template, then overlay live values); interactivity = "Full incl. stream popups" (live values + faceplates/trends + invisible clickable stream hit-regions).

**This session's NEW explicit request (most recent user message, verbatim):** "Screenshots are shared again as many tags are missing, Redo again with these additional changes:
1- Pumps icons to be cropped and new pumps icons displayed showing pumps state (ON/OFF)
2- XVs icons to be cropped and new XV icons displayed showing pumps state (OPEN/CLOSE)"

Interpretation (mine, stated to user): "Redo" = build the still-pending overlay layer NOW (live value `.ind` divs over the screenshot) PLUS the two new asks: crop/cover the static pump symbols baked into the screenshot and overlay dynamic pump icons showing ON/OFF; same for XV symbols showing OPEN/CLOSED. "Many tags missing" because overlays were never built — only the raw screenshot (with its baked static values) is currently displayed; the generated vector layer that had live bindings is hidden by `.screen.shot > *{display:none}`.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- **Image-backed UI (Rev 2):** cleaned DCS screenshot = screen `background-image`; absolutely-positioned overlay divs at image pixel coords carry live values/tags; dynamic pump/XV icons overlaid to cover the static baked symbols; transparent SVG hit-layer over stream lines for popups.
- **Overlay registration:** stage fixed 1366×720; screenshots 321=2962×1408, 322-2=1357×640; `background-size:100% 100%` stretches image to stage. Overlay positions expressed as **percentage of stage** = (px_in_image / image_dimension) so source resolution is irrelevant and alignment is inherent.
- **CRITICAL CSS constraint:** `.screen.shot > *{display:none;}` hides ALL direct children of a shot screen. Overlay divs placed as direct children would be hidden — implementation must exempt overlays (separate overlay container layered above, or a `:not(.overlay)` selector, or restructure).
- **Backend engine UNCHANGED by pivot:** FastAPI + WebSocket at `/ws`, sim loop pushes JSON packet every 0.1 s.
- **Packet shape (drives overlays):** flat keys (`FI_321401`, `TI_top1/2`, `PI_321201/202`, `PY_321201/202`, `PDY_321203/204`, `TI_321020`, `PI_disch`, `XV_321901`, `XV_322901`, `LI_321501`, `LSL_321501`, `totalizer`) + nested objects `pumpA`/`pumpB` ({on,speed,current,mode}), `EJ_322F001` ({motive_kgh,suction_kgh,HIC_322602,mu,TT_322012,PI_disch,total_th,MW,rho,comp_pct...}), `ratio` ({SP,PV,bal,NC_A,NC_B}), `SIC_321950`/`SIC_321951` ({pv,sp,sp_rpm,mv,nc,mode}), `trips`.
- **Commands (UI→backend):** `pump_toggle{id:'A'|'B'}`, `xv_toggle{id:'321901'|'322901'}`, `ext_override{value}`, `controller_set{id,mode,op|sp_rpm|sp|nc}`, `ratio_set{sp}`, `co2_set{value}`, `hic_set{value}`. NOTE: backend pump_toggle only handles A/B (321 pumps); 322 pumps (329P002A/B, 329P006A/B, 329P004A/B) and 322 XVs (XV-322903, HV-322604) have NO backend toggle handlers yet — dynamic icons for those can render state but cannot command until backend extended (respect one-unit rule).
- FastAPI serves frontend via `_NoCacheStatic` StaticFiles mount at `/`, html=True, port 8000, host 0.0.0.0. Use 127.0.0.1 not localhost (IPv6 gotcha).

3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`D:\Work\Urea Simulation\frontend\app.js`** (READ full, 458 lines, not edited this turn):

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

**Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Build strictly ONE UNIT at a time; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

**Rev 2 design (locked):** Cleaned DCS screenshot = `.screen` `background-image`; overlay live transmitter values/icons on top at image pixel coords. Alignment problem vanishes because streams are now image pixels.

**Prior request (carried in):** "Redo again with these additional changes: 1- Pumps icons to be cropped and new pumps icons displayed showing pumps state (ON/OFF) 2- XVs icons to be cropped and new XV icons displayed showing pumps state (OPEN/CLOSE)" — DONE this session (overlays.js v1: dynamic pump + XV icons covering static baked symbols).

Use the ones uploaded in this conversation" — accompanied by 4 screenshots: (1) 321-1 clean with baked black value boxes, (2) 321-1 TAGGED with red tag-name labels in each box, (3) 322-2 TAGGED with red labels, (4) 322-2 clean with baked values.

**My interpretation:** "Same results" = indicator VALUE boxes still show baked STATIC numbers (last turn only delivered pumps/XV, explicitly deferring value overlays). The TAGGED screenshots are the user giving me the exact tag→position→binding map. "Begin fresh" = rebuild the overlay layer (overlays.js v2) from scratch using the accurate tagged map: place LIVE-value overlay boxes (opaque black, covering baked values) on every indicator, bound to the correct packet key. Existing backgrounds are the same screenshots (no PNG file swap possible — pasted images have no disk path; the value extracted is the tag/coordinate map). Drag-to-reposition already built so approximate coords self-correct.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned overlay divs at image pixel coords carry live values/icons.
- Overlay registration by stage px: stage fixed 1366×720; `background-size:100% 100%` stretches image to stage; feature at image-fraction (fx,fy) → stage (fx×1366, fy×720), resolution-independent.
- CRITICAL CSS constraint: `.screen.shot > *{display:none;}` hides ALL direct children. Solved via `:not(.ov-layer)` exemption; `.ov-layer` created by JS as direct child of `.screen`.
- Dynamic icons reuse existing CSS classes: `.pump`/`.pump.on` (grey→green), `.avalve`/`.avalve.closed` (green→red).
- Drag-calibration: "✎ Edit Layout" button toggles `body.ov-editing`; drag overlay → position saved to localStorage key `ots_ov_pos_v1`, loaded on init. Permanently solves alignment without code edits.
- Backend UNCHANGED by pivot: FastAPI + WebSocket `/ws`, sim loop pushes JSON every 0.1s.
- Packet shape (drives overlays): flat keys (`FI_321401`, `TI_top1/2`, `PI_321201/202`, `PY_321201/202`, `PDY_321203/204`, `TI_321020`, `PI_disch`, `XV_321901`, `XV_322901`, `LI_321501`, `LSL_321501`, `totalizer`) + nested objects `pumpA`/`pumpB` ({on,speed,current,mode}), `ratio` ({SP,PV,bal,NC_A,NC_B}), `SIC_321950`/`SIC_321951` ({pv,sp,sp_rpm,mv,nc,mode}), `EJ_322F001`, `trips`.
- Commands (UI→backend): `pump_toggle{id:'A'|'B'}`, `xv_toggle{id:'321901'|'322901'}`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`. Backend pump_toggle ONLY handles A/B; 322 pumps (329P002/004/006) + XV-322903 have NO backend handler (render state-only / local toggle until engine extended — respect one-unit rule).
- Use 127.0.0.1 not localhost (IPv6 gotcha).

Build strictly ONE UNIT at a time; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

The TAGGED screenshots are the user giving me the exact tag→position→binding map. Drag-to-reposition already built so approximate coords self-correct.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned overlay divs at image pixel coords carry live values/icons.
- Overlay registration by stage px: stage fixed 1366×720; `background-size:100% 100%` stretches image to stage; feature at image-fraction (fx,fy) → stage (fx×1366, fy×720), resolution-independent.
- CRITICAL CSS constraint: `.screen.shot > *{display:none;}` hides ALL direct children. Solved via `:not(.ov-layer)` exemption; `.ov-layer` created by JS as direct child of `.screen`.
- Dynamic icons reuse existing CSS classes: `.pump`/`.pump.on` (grey→green), `.avalve`/`.avalve.closed` (green→red).
- Drag-calibration: "✎ Edit Layout" button toggles `body.ov-editing`; drag overlay → position saved to localStorage key `ots_ov_pos_v1`, loaded on init. Permanently solves alignment without code edits.
- Backend UNCHANGED by pivot: FastAPI + WebSocket `/ws`, sim loop pushes JSON every 0.1s.
- Packet shape (drives overlays): flat keys (`FI_321401`, `TI_top1/2`, `PI_321201/202`, `PY_321201/202`, `PDY_321203/204`, `TI_321020`, `PI_disch`, `XV_321901`, `XV_322901`, `LI_321501`, `LSL_321501`, `totalizer`) + nested objects `pumpA`/`pumpB` ({on,speed,current,mode}), `ratio` ({SP,PV,bal,NC_A,NC_B}), `SIC_321950`/`SIC_321951` ({pv,sp,sp_rpm,mv,nc,mode}), `EJ_322F001`, `trips`.
- Commands (UI→backend): `pump_toggle{id:'A'|'B'}`, `xv_toggle{id:'321901'|'322901'}`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`. Backend pump_toggle ONLY handles A/B; 322 pumps (329P002/004/006) + XV-322903 have NO backend handler (render state-only / local toggle until engine extended — respect one-unit rule).
- Use 127.0.0.1 not localhost (IPv6 gotcha).

### 🧑 User

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

**Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Python FastAPI/WebSocket backend (physics, mass balance, control loops) + HTML/CSS/JS frontend (DCS mimic). Build strictly ONE UNIT at a time; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

**Rev 2 design (locked):** Cleaned DCS screenshot = `.screen` `background-image` (stretched to stage via `background-size:100% 100%`); overlay live transmitter values/icons on top at stage pixel coords computed by fraction mapping.

**MOST RECENT request (verbatim, "Mandatory"):** "Discard the 2 screens in the UI '321' and '322-2'. Use the attached DCS screenshots as the UI '321.png' and '322-2.png'. Use the attached file '321 tagged.png' to map transmitter positions for UI 321. Use the attached file '322-2 tagged.png' to map transmitter positions for UI 322-2. Position all tagged transmitters even if they were not binded to equipment or streams, they will be binded in later stages of the project. Display unbinded transmitters as white frames until later to be binded. Pumps icons to be cropped and new pumps icons displayed showing pumps state (ON/OFF). XVs icons to be cropped and new XV icons displayed showing pumps state (OPEN/CLOSE)."

**Interpretation/scope decisions:** This OVERRIDES the prior "one-unit rule leave-322-uncovered" approach for POSITIONING — now ALL tagged transmitters on BOTH screens must be positioned. Binding still respects one-unit rule: only backend-modelled tags get live binds; the rest are positioned as white-frame empty slots awaiting future binding. The actual image files WERE found on disk this time (in `New folder/`), so backgrounds were genuinely swapped (not just remapped).

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned overlay divs at stage pixel coords carry live values/icons.
- **Coordinate mapping (CRITICAL):** Image stretched to stage 1366×720 via `background-size:100% 100%`. A feature at image pixel (px,py) maps to stage (sx,sy) where `sx = px*1366/imgW`, `sy = py*720/imgH`. 321: imgW=1355,imgH=644 (sy factor ≈1.118). 322-2: imgW=1357,imgH=640 (sy factor ≈1.125). Image aspect (≈2.1) ≠ stage aspect (1.897), so vertical is stretched — must use fraction mapping, not raw pixels.
- **Red-label cluster detection:** Python/PIL/numpy mask `(R>140)&(G<90)&(B<90)`, BFS connected components (8+ neighborhood with gap tolerance dy±3,dx±6), filter `len>=45 & w>=22`, output bbox centers → precise tag positions. Multi-part labels merged by widening the dx gap.
- CRITICAL CSS constraint: `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides all static baked children; `.ov-layer` (JS-created direct child) is exempt and carries overlays. Baked VALUES live in the background IMAGE (cannot hide individually) → opaque `.ov.ind` boxes COVER them with live data.
- Dynamic icons reuse CSS: `.pump`/`.pump.on` (grey→green), `.avalve`/`.avalve.closed` (green→red). Dynamic pump/XV icons go on the SYMBOL location (bowtie/circle), NOT the red label location.
- Drag-calibration: "✎ Edit Layout" button toggles `body.ov-editing`; drag overlay → position saved to localStorage; loaded on init. Absorbs residual coordinate offset without code edits.
- Backend UNCHANGED. FastAPI + WebSocket `/ws`, sim loop pushes JSON every 0.1s.
- Packet shape: flat keys (`FI_321401`, `TI_top1/2`, `PI_321201/202`, `PY_321201/202`, `PDY_321203/204`, `TI_321020`, `PI_disch`, `XV_321901`, `XV_322901`, `LI_321501`, `LSL_321501`, `totalizer`, `HIC_322602`) + nested objects `pumpA`/`pumpB` ({on,speed,current,mode}), `ratio` ({SP,PV,bal,NC_A,NC_B}), `SIC_321950`/`SIC_321951` ({pv,sp,sp_rpm,mv,nc,mode}), `EJ_322F001`, `trips`.
- Commands (UI→backend): `pump_toggle{id:'A'|'B'}`, `xv_toggle{id:'321901'|'322901'}`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`. Backend pump_toggle ONLY handles A/B; 322 pumps (329P002/004/006) + XV-322903 have NO backend handler → render state-only / local toggle.
- Use 127.0.0.1 not localhost (IPv6 gotcha).

Engine functions to PRESERVE in v3: `gp(o,path)` (dot-path resolver via `path.split('.').reduce(...)`); `fmt(v,d)` (null/NaN→'--', else `Number(v).toFixed(d??1)`); `svgPump()` (`<svg viewBox="0 0 56 56"><circle cx=28 cy=32 r=22 class=body/><polygon points="18,20 18,44 42,32" class=tri/></svg>`); `svgXV()` (two bowtie polygons stroke #22ff22 fill #0c0c0c, viewBox "0 0 34 24"); `pumpOn(sid,o)` (reads `gp(lastS,o.bind).on`); `xvOpen(sid,o)` (reads `!!gp(lastS,o.bind)`, else local/`o.def!==false`); `renderOne` (pump→toggle `.on`+data-tip ON/OFF; xv→toggle `.closed` when !open + OPEN/CLOSED; ind→empty keeps tag text, bound sets `innerHTML='<b>'+fmt(v,dec)+'</b> <span class=ou>'+unit+'</span>'`); `activate(sid,o)` (pump+id→`otsSend({type:'pump_toggle',id:o.id})`; xv+cmd→`otsSend({type:'xv_toggle',id:o.cmd})`; ind+fp→`window.openFaceplate(o.fp)`; else local toggle); `attach(el,sid,o)` (mousedown drag when editing→save localStorage; click→activate when !editing; contextmenu→`window.openTrend(o.tag)` for bound ind); `build(sid)`; `editButton()`; `window.OV_apply=function(s){lastS=s;renderAll()}`.

- **`D:\Work\Urea Simulation\frontend\app.js`** (EDITED this session — buildTabs number-only, DONE):
   - New buildTabs (L424-431):
     ```
     // top tab bar: one button per screen; label = screen NUMBER only (drop descriptive name)
     function buildTabs(){
       const bar=document.getElementById('tabbar'); if(!bar) return;
       const cur=document.querySelector('.screen.active');
       bar.innerHTML=[...document.querySelectorAll('.screen')].map(sc=>{
         const num=(sc.dataset.label||sc.id).split(' ')[0];   // "322-2 HP SCRUBBER" -> "322-2"
         return `<button data-go="${sc.id}"${sc===cur?' class="active"':''}>${num}</button>`;
       }).join('');
       bar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=> b.onclick=()=> switchScreen(b.dataset.go));
     }
     ```
   - Also exposes (from earlier): `window.otsSend=send;`, `window.openTrend`, `window.openFaceplate`; onmessage calls `if(window.OV_apply) window.OV_apply(s)`.

**How use:**
- Click **✎ Edit Layout** (bottom-right) → edit mode. Tags get dashed outline.
- **➕ Add Tag** → modal: tag label, type (ind/pump/xv), **Bind** dropdown auto-filled from live packet keys, unit, decimals, cmd/id. New tag drops at stage center → drag to place. Bound tag shows live value instantly; no bind → white frame.
- **Right-click any tag** → ✎ Edit/Bind or 🗑 Delete.
- **Drag** any tag → reposition (saved).
- **⟲ Reset** → restore active screen to seed defaults.
- **⬇ Export / ⬆ Import** → move layouts between machines (JSON).

**Data model (localStorage):**
- `ots_ov_pos_v3` — positions (`sid|k → {x,y}`).
- `ots_ov_tags_v3` — per screen `{add:[…], edit:{k:{…}}, del:[k]}`. Effective config = seed − deletes + field-edits ++ added. Seed tags never mutated on disk (deletes are tombstones, edits are overrides) → Reset always recovers them.

Add/edit/delete targets the **active** screen. Backend untouched.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned overlay divs carry live values/icons.
- Coordinate mapping: image stretched to stage 1366×720; feature at image px (px,py)→stage (sx,sy): `sx=px*1366/imgW`, `sy=py*720/imgH`. 321 img 1355×644; 322-2 img 1357×640. Vertical stretched (~1.12×).
- Red-label cluster detection (PIL/numpy) earlier produced precise tag stage coords for all tags.
- CSS constraint: `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked children; `.ov-layer` exempt. Opaque `.ov.ind` boxes COVER baked values with live data.
- Dynamic icons: `.pump`/`.pump.on` (grey→green), `.avalve`/`.avalve.closed` (green→red). Pump/XV overlays sit on the SYMBOL (bowtie/circle), cropping it.
- Drag-calibration: "✎ Edit Layout" toggles `body.ov-editing`; drag → position saved to localStorage.
- **NEW: tag editor** — two localStorage stores (positions + tag overrides), merged-config accessor, modal form, context menu, add/edit/delete/reset/export/import.
- Backend UNCHANGED. FastAPI + WebSocket `/ws`, sim loop pushes JSON every 0.1s. Use 127.0.0.1 (IPv6 gotcha).
- Packet shape: flat keys (`FI_321401`, `TI_top1/2`, `PI_321201/202`, `PY_321201/202`, `PDY_321203/204`, `TI_321020`, `PI_disch`, `XV_321901`, `XV_322901`, `LI_321501`, `LSL_321501`, `totalizer`, `HIC_322602`) + nested objects `pumpA`/`pumpB` ({on,speed,current,mode}), `ratio` ({SP,PV,bal,NC_A,NC_B}), `SIC_321950`/`SIC_321951` ({pv,sp,sp_rpm,mv,nc,mode}), `EJ_322F001`, `trips`.
- Commands (UI→backend): `pump_toggle{id:'A'|'B'}`, `xv_toggle{id:'321901'|'322901'}`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`. 322 pumps (329P002/004/006) + XV-322903 have NO backend handler → render state-only / local toggle.

  - **Tag-editor data model (added after pos load):**
    ```
    const MK = 'ots_ov_tags_v3';   // per screen: { add:[{k,t,x,y,tag,bind,u,dec,cmd,id}], edit:{k:{...}}, del:[k] }
    let ovr = {}; try { ovr = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(MK)||'{}'); } catch(e){ ovr={}; }
    const smap = sid => (ovr[sid] || (ovr[sid] = { add:[], edit:{}, del:[] }));
    const saveTags = () => localStorage.setItem(MK, JSON.stringify(ovr));
    function cfg(sid){
      const o=ovr[sid]||{}, del=new Set(o.del||[]), ed=o.edit||{};
      const base=(OV[sid]||[]).filter(e=>!del.has(e.k)).map(e=> ed[e.k]?Object.assign({},e,ed[e.k]):e);
      return base.concat((o.add||[]).filter(e=>!del.has(e.k)));
    }
    ```
  - `renderAll` now: `for (const sid in OV) cfg(sid).forEach(o => renderOne(sid, o));`
  - `build(sid)` now rebuildable:
    ```
    let layer = screen.querySelector('.ov-layer');
    if (!layer){ layer=document.createElement('div'); layer.className='ov-layer'; screen.appendChild(layer); }
    layer.innerHTML='';
    for (const key in elMap) if (key.indexOf(sid+'|')===0) delete elMap[key];
    cfg(sid).forEach(o => { ... });
    ```
  - `attach` contextmenu: `if (editing){ openMenu(e,sid,o); return; } if (o.t==='ind'&&o.bind&&window.openTrend) window.openTrend(o.tag);`
  - Editor functions added: `injectCSS()` (toolbar/menu/modal CSS, plus `body.ov-editing .ov{outline:1px dashed...}`); `flattenKeys(obj,pre,out)` (all dot-paths of lastS for Bind dropdown); `ensureModal()` (builds `#ov-modal` with fields `ovm-tag/ovm-type/ovm-bind/ovm-unit/ovm-dec/ovm-cmd` + Delete/Cancel/Save, Esc/Enter handlers); `fillBindOptions(sel,cur)`; `openModal(sid,o)`/`closeModal()`; `saveModal()`:
    ```
    const fields = { tag, t, bind };
    if (t==='ind'){ fields.u=u; fields.dec=isNaN(dec)?1:dec; }
    if (t==='xv') fields.cmd=cmd;  if (t==='pump') fields.id=cmd;
    if (o){ const added=smap(sid).add.filter(e=>e.k===o.k)[0];
            if (added){ ['bind','u','dec','cmd','id'].forEach(kk=>delete added[kk]); Object.assign(added,fields); }
            else smap(sid).edit[o.k]=fields; }
    else { const k='u'+Date.now().toString(36);
           const e=Object.assign({k,x:STAGE_W/2-20,y:STAGE_H/2-9},fields);
           smap(sid).add.push(e); pos[sid+'|'+k]={x:Math.round(e.x),y:Math.round(e.y)};
           localStorage.setItem(LSK,JSON.stringify(pos)); }
    saveTags(); closeModal(); rebuild(sid);
    ```
    `deleteTag(sid,o)` (added→filter out; seed→tombstone in `del[]`; clears pos); `openMenu/closeMenu/closeMenuOnce` (Edit/Bind + Delete); `activeSid()`; `resetScreen(sid)` (confirm → delete ovr[sid] + clear sid positions → rebuild); `exportLayout()` (downloads `ots-ui-layout.json` `{v:3,tags:ovr,pos}`); `importLayout(ev)` (FileReader → restore ovr+pos → rebuild all); `rebuild(sid){ build(sid); cfg(sid).forEach(o=>renderOne(sid,o)); }`; `editButton()` now builds `#ov-toolbar` (Edit Layout / Add Tag / Reset / Export / Import + hidden file input) with `.ov-eo` buttons shown only in `body.ov-editing`, and a delegated document click handler for `ovm-save`/`ovm-cancel`/`ovm-del`.

### 🤖 Assistant

Done. HP Ejector 322F001 boundary bound across 321→322.

**Stream map (322F001):**

| Line | Source | Transmitters | Bind | Source of props/comp |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Suction A (motive) | 321P002 A/B discharge | TI-321020, XV-322901 | `TI_321020`, `XV_322901` | screen 321-1 (live, pure NH₃) |
| Suction B | 322E003 overflow | PI-329201, TI-322002 | `EJ_322F001.PI_329201`, `EJ_322F001.TI_322002` | design boundary (static, see below) |
| Discharge → 322E002 HPCC | 322F001 outlet | TT-322012 | `EJ_322F001.TT_322012` | computed (energy balance) |

**Fixes:**
- PI-329201 was wrong-bound to `PI_disch` (pump/diffuser header ~144–154 bar). Now reads suction-B line P.
- TI-322002, TT-322012 were white-frame. Now bound.
- Suction-A already correct: motive flow + composition pulled from modelled 321 (pure NH₃, gated by XV-322901).

**Governing equations (already in `ejector_322f001`):**

Component mass balance:
$$\dot m_{i,\text{disch}} = \dot m_{i,\text{motive}} + \dot m_{i,\text{suction}}, \qquad i \in \{\mathrm{CO_2,CH_4,H_2,H_2O,N_2,NH_3,O_2,Urea,Biuret}\}$$

Entrainment (HV-322602 spindle sets it):
$$\mu = \mu_{\text{des}}\,\frac{\theta_{\text{des}}}{\theta_{\text{eff}}}, \qquad \dot m_{\text{suc}} = \mu\,\dot m_{\text{motive}}, \qquad \dot m_{i,\text{suc}} = \dot m_{\text{suc}}\,x_{i,\text{carb}}$$
with $\theta_{\text{des}}=74\%$, $\mu_{\text{des}}=\dfrac{\sum_i \dot m_{i,\text{suc,des}}}{\dot m_{\text{NH_3,motive,des}}}\approx1.4125$.

Discharge composition:
$$\dot m_{i,\text{disch}} = \dot m_{\text{motive}}\,\delta_{i,\mathrm{NH_3}} + \dot m_{i,\text{suc}}, \qquad \dot m_d=\sum_i \dot m_{i,\text{disch}}$$

Energy balance → discharge temp (TT-322012):
$$\dot m_d\,c_{p,D}\,T_d = \dot m_{\text{motive}}\,c_{p,N}\,T_{\text{motive}} + \dot m_{\text{suc}}\,c_{p,C}\,T_{\text{suc}}$$
$$\boxed{\,T_d = \dfrac{\dot m_{\text{motive}}\,c_{p,N}\,T_{\text{motive}} + \dot m_{\text{suc}}\,c_{p,C}\,T_{\text{suc}}}{\dot m_d\,c_{p,D}}\,}$$
$c_{p,N},c_{p,C},c_{p,D} = 4.74,\,3.10,\,3.50\ \mathrm{kJ/kg\,K}$; $T_{\text{motive}}=$ TI-321020 (live from 321).

**Suction-B boundary (new constants):**
$$T_{\text{suc}} = 178.8\,^\circ\mathrm{C}\ (\text{TI-322002}), \qquad P_{\text{suc}} = 140.0\ \mathrm{bar\,a}\ (\text{PI-329201})$$
STATIC — 322E003 HP scrubber not modelled yet (one-unit-at-a-time). When 322E003 built, swap these two constants for its live overflow stream; ejector model + discharge already propagate dynamically.

Both files syntax-pass. Hard-refresh browser (clears stale localStorage render).

### 🤖 Assistant

Verified end-to-end — already correct, no code change needed.

**Chain (HIC-322602 → HV-322602 → 322F001 → 322E003 suction):**

| Stage | Location | Behavior |
|---|---|---|
| Operator sets HIC-322602 | `app.js:408` | `send({type:'hic_set',value:v})` via HV-322602 (MANUAL) faceplate (`index.html:556-558`, opens from tag or % box `app.js:411-414`) |
| Handler stores opening | `main.py:472` | `s.HIC_322602 = clamp(value,0,100)` |
| HV-322602 = 322F001 spindle | `main.py:323` | `ej = ejector_322f001(motive_nh3_kgh, TI_321020, s.HIC_322602)` — HIC_322602 passed as `hv_open_pct` |
| Opening → 322E003 suction | `main.py:106-107` | `mu = EJ_MU·(EJ_OPEN_DES/open_eff)`, `m_suc = mu·motive` |

**Direction confirmed correct:**
$$\mu = \mu_{\text{des}}\,\frac{\theta_{\text{des}}}{\theta_{\text{eff}}}, \qquad \theta_{\text{des}}=74\%, \quad \theta_{\text{eff}}=\mathrm{clamp}(\text{HIC-322602},\,10,\,100)$$

- opening = 74% → $\mu=\mu_{\text{des}}$ (design Carb. Liq.).
- opening ↓ 50% → $\mu=1.48\,\mu_{\text{des}}$ → **more 322E003 carbamate suction** → higher discharge flow to 322E002 HPCC.
- opening ↑ 100% → $\mu=0.74\,\mu_{\text{des}}$ → less suction.

Floor at 10% prevents runaway/div-zero (max $\mu=7.4\,\mu_{\text{des}}$). Suction also gated by motive: pumps off / XV-322901 shut → motive=0 → $m_{suc}=0$ regardless of opening (physically right — no jet, no entrainment).

Inverse relation already surfaced to operator in ejector trend: `app.js:305` → `"Entrainment μ … (↓ HV-322602 ⇒ ↑ μ)"`.

Nothing to fix.

## 2. Key Technical Concepts

- Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image` stretched to stage 1366×720; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons.
- Coordinate mapping: feature at image px (px,py) on native imgW×imgH → stage (sx,sy): `sx=px*1366/imgW`, `sy=py*720/imgH`. STAGE_W=1366, STAGE_H=720.
- CSS: `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked children; `.ov-layer` exempt; opaque `.ov.ind` boxes cover baked printed values.
- Overlay types: `ind` (indicator), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve`. Unbound `ind` = white frame.
- Tag editor: localStorage `LSK='ots_ov_pos_v3'` (positions) + `MK='ots_ov_tags_v3'` (add/edit/del overrides); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides; build/rebuild; "✎ Edit Layout" drag mode; Reset/Export/Import.
- Backend packet: flat keys + nested objects, pushed over WebSocket `/ws` every 0.1s; UI binds via flat keys or dotted paths (e.g. `EJ_322F001.TT_322012`, `pumpA.current`, `SIC_321950.pv`). Use host 127.0.0.1.
- Dynamic propagation rule: any valve opening / stream property / composition change must propagate to all downstream streams, transmitters, equipment per modelling equations.
- HP ejector: liquid-liquid jet pump; entrainment μ set by HV-322602 spindle opening; decreasing opening → higher μ → more 322E003 suction.

## 3. Files and Code Sections

### `D:\Work\Urea Simulation\backend\main.py` (EDITED this session)
HP ejector model is at lines 66-117. Key constants: `EJ_MOTIVE_NH3_DES=40756.0`, `EJ_DES_TOTAL=98320.0`, `EJ_MU≈1.4125`, `EJ_OPEN_DES=74.0`, `EJ_CP_N,EJ_CP_C,EJ_CP_D=4.74,3.10,3.50`, `EJ_T_SUCTION_C=178.8`, `EJ_P_DISCH_BARA=144.2`, `EJ_RHO_DISCH=877.9`.

`ejector_322f001(motive_nh3_kgh, T_motive_C, hv_open_pct)` core:
```python
open_eff = clamp(hv_open_pct, 10.0, 100.0)
mu       = EJ_MU * (EJ_OPEN_DES / open_eff)   # opening↓ → mu↑ → more 322E003 suction
m_suc    = mu * motive_nh3_kgh
T_d = (motive_nh3_kgh*EJ_CP_N*T_motive_C + m_suc*EJ_CP_C*EJ_T_SUCTION_C) / (m_d*EJ_CP_D)
```
Line 323: `ej = ejector_322f001(motive_nh3_kgh, TI_321020, s.HIC_322602)`.

**Edit 1 (added after `EJ_RHO_DISCH` line ~91):**
```python
EJ_P_SUCTION_BARA = 140.0        # bar a, 322E003 overflow -> 322F001 suction-B line (PI-329201).
                                 # Design boundary; STATIC until 322E003 HP scrubber is modelled,
                                 # then PI-329201 becomes the live 322E003 overflow line pressure.
```
**Edit 2 (EJ_322F001 packet block ~382):**
```python
            "TT_322012":   round(ej["T_C"], 1),      # discharge temp (C) -> 322E002 HPCC
            "PI_disch":    round(ej["P_bara"], 1),   # discharge pressure (bar a)
            "TI_322002":   round(EJ_T_SUCTION_C, 1),    # suction-B temp (C): 322E003 overflow
            "PI_329201":   round(EJ_P_SUCTION_BARA, 1), # suction-B line P (bar a): 322E003->322F001
```
Command handler (line 471-472): `elif t == "hic_set": s.HIC_322602 = clamp(float(cmd["value"]), 0.0, 100.0)`.
Other commands: `pump_toggle`, `xv_toggle`, `controller_set` (id/mode/op/sp/sp_rpm/nc), `ratio_set` (sp), `co2_set` (`s.F_CO2_th=max(0,value)`), `hic_set`. Existing CO2 state: `s.F_CO2_th`; ratio uses `m_CO2`.

Build strictly **ONE UNIT at a time**; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

  - `A) CO2 feed line composition and properties attached`
  - `B) Mapping CO2 feed line:`
    - `1) 320K002 (to be considered as BL not to be registered) - "FT-322403" indicates CO2 flow in NM3/hr - "FY-322403" indicates CO2 flow in Tons/hr - "TI-322017" indicates CO2 feed stream temperature - "XV-322902" - HP Stripper "322E001"`
    - `2) Vent to safe location on CO2 feed line with valve "PV-322203". Controller "PIC-322203" indicates the CO2 feed line pressure and controls the opening of "PV-322203". "HIC-322203" controls the minimum opening of "PV-322203". Opening "PV-322203" decreases flow of CO2 feed`

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons. CSS `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked DOM.
   - Coordinate mapping: image px (px,py) on native imgW×imgH → stage: `sx=px*1366/imgW`, `sy=py*720/imgH`. STAGE_W=1366, STAGE_H=720.
   - Overlay types: `ind` (indicator; unbound=white frame), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve`. Faceplate dispatch in `activate()`: `if (o.fp && window.openFaceplate)` (SIC-object style).
   - Tag editor: localStorage `LSK='ots_ov_pos_v3'` (positions) + `MK='ots_ov_tags_v3'` (add/edit/del overrides); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides.
   - Backend: flat + nested packet over WS `/ws` every 0.1s (DT). Host 127.0.0.1. Commands: `pump_toggle`, `xv_toggle`, `ext_override`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`, plus NEW `hic2_set`, `pic_set`.
   - Dynamic propagation rule (mandatory): any valve/stream-property/composition change propagates to all downstream streams/transmitters/equipment.
   - CO2 feed model: `F_feed = F_raw*(1−f_vent)`; `f_vent=(PV_open/100)*0.15`; `PV_open=max(HIC-322203 min, PIC-322203 op)`; `s.F_CO2_th` (actual feed) drives the N/C ratio block; `Load% = feed/54.618×100`.
   - HP ejector: `mu = EJ_MU*(EJ_OPEN_DES/open_eff)`; decreasing HV-322602 opening → higher μ → more 322E003 suction.

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`D:\Work\Urea Simulation\backend\main.py`** (EDITED — CO2 feed model, this session)
     - Top constants (lines 34-64): NH3_RHO=604.8, NC_FACTOR=M_CO2/M_NH3=2.584, NC_TO_MASS=M_NH3/M_CO2, M_NH3=17.031, M_CO2=44.009, DT=0.1, MW_COMP table (CO2:44.0098, H2O:18.0152, N2:28.0134, O2:31.9988, NH3:17.0304, CH4:16.043, H2:2.0158, Urea:60.056, Biuret:103.081).
     - Ejector (66-120): EJ_MU≈1.4125, EJ_OPEN_DES=74.0, EJ_T_SUCTION_C=178.8, EJ_P_DISCH_BARA=144.2, EJ_RHO_DISCH=877.9, EJ_P_SUCTION_BARA=140.0. `ejector_322f001(motive_nh3_kgh, T_motive_C, hv_open_pct)`.
     - **Edit A — CO2 feed constants** (inserted after EJ_P_SUCTION_BARA block):
       ```python
       CO2_FEED_MOLFRAC  = {"CO2": 0.9524, "H2O": 0.0061, "N2": 0.0355, "O2": 0.0060}
       CO2_FEED_MW       = sum(CO2_FEED_MOLFRAC[k] * MW_COMP[k] for k in CO2_FEED_MOLFRAC)  # = 43.21
       CO2_DES_KGH       = 54618.0      # kg/h design total CO2-feed mass (54.618 t/h = 100 % Load)
       CO2_DES_KMOLH     = 1264.0       # kmol/h design total molar flow
       CO2_T_FEED_C      = 120.0        # C, TI-322017 feed temperature (design)
       CO2_P_DES_BARA    = 144.2        # bar a, design CO2 feed-line pressure (PIC-322203 PV)
       CO2_RHO           = 242.70       # kg/m3, eff. density @ 120 C, 144.2 bar a
       NM3_PER_KMOL      = 22.414       # Nm3/kmol at 0 C, 1 atm (FT-322403 normal-volume basis)
       CO2_VENT_MAX_FRAC = 0.15         # PV-322203 fully open vents up to 15 % of raw CO2 feed
       CO2_PV_DP_GAIN    = 0.25         # bar a line-pressure drop per % PV-322203 opening
       CO2_MASSFRAC_CO2  = CO2_FEED_MOLFRAC["CO2"] * MW_COMP["CO2"] / CO2_FEED_MW   # ~0.970 pure CO2
       ```
     - **Edit B — State.__init__ additions** (after `self.F_CO2_th = 54.618`):
       ```python
       self.F_CO2_raw_th = 54.618 # t/h, raw CO2 from 320K002 compressor (BL boundary)
       self.XV_322902    = True   # CO2 feed isolation to HP Stripper 322E001 (True=OPEN)
       self.HIC_322203   = 0.0    # %, HIC-322203 = PV-322203 minimum opening (operator)
       self.PIC_322203   = {"mode": "MAN", "op": 0.0, "sp": CO2_P_DES_BARA, "pv": CO2_P_DES_BARA}
       ```
       (NOTE: `self.F_CO2_th` comment changed to "actual CO2 feed to 322E001 (derived: raw - vent)".)
     - **Edit C — CO2 feed model block** (inserted in `step_sim` immediately after `disch_open = bool(s.XV_322901)`, BEFORE the cascade block so feed is fresh for cascade + ratio):
       ```python
       pic = s.PIC_322203
       if pic["mode"] == "AUTO":
           pic["op"] = clamp(pic["op"] + 0.5 * (pic["pv"] - pic["sp"]) * dt, 0.0, 100.0)
       pv_open = clamp(max(s.HIC_322203, pic["op"]), 0.0, 100.0)
       feed_factor = 1.0 if s.XV_322902 else 0.0          # isolation shut -> no feed
       f_vent = (pv_open / 100.0) * CO2_VENT_MAX_FRAC
       F_CO2_feed_kgh = s.F_CO2_raw_th * 1000.0 * (1.0 - f_vent) * feed_factor
       s.F_CO2_th = F_CO2_feed_kgh / 1000.0               # t/h actual feed -> drives ratio block
       CO2_feed_kmolh = F_CO2_feed_kgh / CO2_FEED_MW      # kmol/h
       FT_322403 = CO2_feed_kmolh * NM3_PER_KMOL          # Nm3/h  (FT-322403)
       FY_322403 = s.F_CO2_th                             # t/h    (FY-322403)
       Load_pct  = s.F_CO2_th / (CO2_DES_KGH / 1000.0) * 100.0   # % of design CO2 flow
       P_line_bara = CO2_P_DES_BARA - CO2_PV_DP_GAIN * pv_open   # PIC-322203 PV (bar a)
       pic["pv"] = P_line_bara
       ```
     - **Edit G — packet block** (inserted in return dict after `EJ_322F001` object, before `"ratio"`):
       ```python
       "CO2_FEED": {
           "FT_322403":  round(FT_322403, 0),
           "FY_322403":  round(FY_322403, 2),
           "TI_322017":  round(CO2_T_FEED_C, 1),
           "pure_th":    round(s.F_CO2_th * CO2_MASSFRAC_CO2, 2),
           "raw_th":     round(s.F_CO2_raw_th, 2),
           "Load":       round(Load_pct, 1),
           "XV_322902":  bool(s.XV_322902),
           "PV_322203":  round(pv_open, 1),
           "HIC_322203": round(s.HIC_322203, 1),
           "PIC_322203": round(pic["pv"], 1),
           "PIC_op":     round(pic["op"], 1),
           "PIC_sp":     round(pic["sp"], 1),
           "PIC_mode":   pic["mode"],
       },
       ```
     - **Edit E — xv_toggle** added branch: `elif cmd["id"] == "322902": s.XV_322902 = not s.XV_322902`.
     - **Edit D + F — command handlers**:
       ```python
       elif t == "co2_set":                       # raw CO2 from 320K002 compressor (t/h)
           s.F_CO2_raw_th = max(0.0, float(cmd["value"]))
       elif t == "hic_set":                       # HIC-322602 -> HV-322602 ejector opening
           s.HIC_322602 = clamp(float(cmd["value"]), 0.0, 100.0)
       elif t == "hic2_set":                      # HIC-322203 -> PV-322203 minimum opening
           s.HIC_322203 = clamp(float(cmd["value"]), 0.0, 100.0)
       elif t == "pic_set":                       # PIC-322203 CO2 line-pressure controller
           pic = s.PIC_322203
           if "mode" in cmd:
               pic["mode"] = cmd["mode"]
           if "op" in cmd and pic["mode"] == "MAN":
               pic["op"] = clamp(float(cmd["op"]), 0.0, 100.0)
           if "sp" in cmd:
               pic["sp"] = float(cmd["sp"])
       ```
     - Existing relevant: ratio uses `m_CO2 = max(s.F_CO2_th, 1e-6)`, `NC_A=(F_A_th/m_CO2)*NC_FACTOR`, `NC_B` similar — so venting auto-raises N/C. `HIC_322602` default 74.0; ejector called `ej = ejector_322f001(motive_nh3_kgh, TI_321020, s.HIC_322602)`.

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **HIC-322602 faceplate bug** (user-reported, root-caused this session, NOT yet fixed): visible HIC is overlay `h602` with no `fp`/`face` field, so `activate()` does nothing. The `#hicModal` open handlers are bound to hidden baked DOM (`#hic-box`, `.pi[data-tag="HIC_322602"]`). `window.openFaceplate` is SIC-object-style, incompatible with scalar HIC. **Planned fix:** add generic `face` registry — in overlays.js `activate()` ind branch add `if (o.face && window.OTS_FACE && window.OTS_FACE[o.face]) { window.OTS_FACE[o.face](o); return; }` before the `fp` check; in `build()` line 219 use `if (o.fp || o.face) el.classList.add('fp');`; add `face:'hic'` to h602 config; expose `window.OTS_FACE = { hic, hic2, pic }` from app.js (the HIC IIFE `open` fn = `()=>{ if(m) m.classList.add('show'); }`).
   - **No syntax errors:** `main.py OK` after CO2 edits.
   - **CO2 composition basis** resolved as MOL% (not mass%): verified MW=43.21 and Load reconciliation; pure-CO2 mass fraction ≈0.970 means Load% is basis-invariant → `Load% = F_CO2_th/54.618×100`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Implemented + integrated full CO2 feed model so venting PV-322203 dynamically reduces `s.F_CO2_th`, which propagates to the N/C ratio block (NC_A/NC_B rise) and Load (falls) — satisfies the dynamic-propagation mandate and the user's "Opening PV-322203 decreases flow of CO2 feed" + "CO2 flow decreases → Load decreases".
   - Repurposed `co2_set` to set raw compressor flow (`F_CO2_raw_th`) since `F_CO2_th` is now derived each tick; without this the per-tick recompute would overwrite a direct set.
   - PIC-322203 modeled as reverse-acting (open vent when P>SP) via a plain dict (not the SIC `Controller` class) to avoid the positive-feedback sign issue and because the pressure-building stripper 322E001 is not yet modeled.

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:

**Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Python FastAPI/WebSocket backend (physics, mass balance, control loops) + HTML/CSS/JS frontend (DCS mimic). Build strictly **ONE UNIT at a time**; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

**Rev 2 UI design (locked):** Cleaned DCS screenshot = `.screen` `background-image` (stretched `background-size:100% 100%`); live transmitter values/icons overlaid at stage pixel coords via fraction mapping. Unbound transmitters = WHITE FRAMES.

**MOST RECENT verbatim 5-part work-order (5 images attached, being executed):**
- `* "HIC-322602" does not open faceplate when clicked`
- `* "HV-322602" position placed on updated "322-2 tagged.png" attached`
- `* Buttons having equipment tag should be active when pressed switch the view to the screen with the related equipment`
- `* "322-1" and "322-1 tagged" attached, generate UI screen for 322-1 and bind tags`
- `* Describtion CO2 feed line:`
  - `A) CO2 feed line composition and properties attached`
  - `B) Mapping CO2 feed line:`
    - `1) 320K002 (to be considered as BL not to be registered) - "FT-322403" indicates CO2 flow in NM3/hr - "FY-322403" indicates CO2 flow in Tons/hr - "TI-322017" indicates CO2 feed stream temperature - "XV-322902" - HP Stripper "322E001"`
    - `2) Vent to safe location on CO2 feed line with valve "PV-322203". Controller "PIC-322203" indicates the CO2 feed line pressure and controls the opening of "PV-322203". "HIC-322203" controls the minimum opening of "PV-322203". Opening "PV-322203" decreases flow of CO2 feed`
    - `3) "Load" indicates the urea plant load which is a percentage of the CO2 design flow (attached) so when CO2 flow decreases "Load" decreases`
  - `Register added tags`

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons. CSS `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked DOM (THIS is why baked `data-goto` blocks and `#hic-box` are non-clickable on shot screens).
   - Coordinate mapping (fractional, handles tagged/clean dim mismatch): `sx = (px_tagged/imgW_tagged)*1366`, `sy = (py_tagged/imgH_tagged)*720`. STAGE_W=1366, STAGE_H=720.
   - Overlay types: `ind` (indicator; unbound=white frame), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve`, plus NEW `nav` (transparent screen-nav hotspot added this session). Faceplate dispatch via two mechanisms: legacy `o.fp`→`window.openFaceplate` (SIC-object) and NEW generic `o.face`→`window.OTS_FACE[o.face](o)`.
   - Tag editor: localStorage `LSK='ots_ov_pos_v3'` (positions) + `MK='ots_ov_tags_v3'` (add/edit/del overrides); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides; drag-reposition in Edit Layout mode → coords are calibrate-then-drag (guidelines explicitly allow eye-estimated initial coords).
   - Backend: flat + nested packet over WS `/ws` every 0.1s (DT). Host 127.0.0.1. Commands: `pump_toggle`, `xv_toggle`, `ext_override`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`, `hic2_set`, `pic_set`.
   - Dynamic propagation rule (mandatory): any valve/stream-property/composition change propagates to all downstream streams/transmitters/equipment.
   - CO2 feed model (DONE in backend): `F_feed = F_raw*(1−f_vent)`; `f_vent=(PV_open/100)*0.15`; `PV_open=max(HIC-322203 min, PIC-322203 op)`; `s.F_CO2_th` (actual feed) drives N/C ratio block; `Load% = feed/54.618×100`.
   - HP ejector: `mu = EJ_MU*(EJ_OPEN_DES/open_eff)`; decreasing HV-322602 opening → higher μ → more 322E003 suction.

Build strictly **ONE UNIT at a time**; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

       - `2) Vent to safe location on CO2 feed line with valve "PV-322203". Controller "PIC-322203" indicates the CO2 feed line pressure and controls the opening of "PV-322203". "HIC-322203" controls the minimum opening of "PV-322203". Opening "PV-322203" decreases flow of CO2 feed`
       - `3) "Load" indicates the urea plant load which is a percentage of the CO2 design flow (attached) so when CO2 flow decreases "Load" decreases`
     - `Register added tags`

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons. CSS `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked DOM (so baked `data-goto` blocks are dead on shot screens; new `nav` overlays replace them).
   - STAGE_W=1366, STAGE_H=720. Fractional coordinate mapping per-screen:
     - **322-1**: native tagged = 1320×619 → kx = 1366/1320 = 1.0348, ky = 720/619 = 1.1632. From a 2× tile with origin (tx,ty) in source px and feature at tile-pixel (X,Y): `src_px = (tx + X/2, ty + Y/2)`; `stage_x = src_px_x * 1.0348`, `stage_y = src_px_y * 1.1632`.
     - **322-2**: native tagged = 1357×640 → kx = 1366/1357 = 1.0066, ky = 720/640 = 1.125.
   - Overlay types: `ind` (indicator; unbound=white frame), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve`, `nav` (transparent screen-nav hotspot). Faceplate dispatch: legacy `o.fp`→`window.openFaceplate` (SIC objects) and generic `o.face`→`window.OTS_FACE[o.face](o)`.
   - Tag editor: localStorage `LSK='ots_ov_pos_v3'` (positions) + `MK='ots_ov_tags_v3'` (add/edit/del overrides); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides. Adding a NEW screen does not drift existing-screen coords, so no version bump needed.
   - Backend: flat + nested packet over WS `/ws` every 0.1 s. Host 127.0.0.1. Commands: `pump_toggle`, `xv_toggle`, `ext_override`, `controller_set`, `ratio_set`, `co2_set`, `hic_set`, `hic2_set`, `pic_set`.
   - Dynamic propagation (mandatory): any valve/stream-property/composition change propagates to all downstream streams/transmitters/equipment.
   - **CO2 feed model (DONE in backend):** $F_{feed} = F_{raw}\,(1 - f_{vent})$; $f_{vent} = \frac{PV_{open}}{100} \times 0.15$; $PV_{open} = \max(\text{HIC-322203 min},\ \text{PIC-322203 op})$; $\text{Load\%} = \frac{F_{feed}}{54.618} \times 100$. `s.F_CO2_th` (actual feed) drives the N/C ratio block.
   - **HP ejector:** $\mu = EJ\_MU \times \frac{EJ\_OPEN\_DES}{open\_{eff}}$; decreasing HV-322602 opening → higher $\mu$ → more 322E003 suction.

Generic controller faceplate now full MAN/AUTO/CAS.

**Behavior:**
- **MAN** → Output(%) editable, SP locked. Operator sets valve opening directly.
- **AUTO** → SP editable, Output locked. Controller drives opening to hold SP.
- **CAS** → both locked. Opening driven by linked (cascade) parameter.

Active mode = green highlight (`.mode-group button.active`). Field enable/disable + note switch live on button press.

**State:** mode/SP/OP persisted per-tag in localStorage `ots_ctl_v1` → faceplate remembers operator intent across opens (unmodelled loops have no backend echo). PV reads live from `bind` when present.

**SET** sends `controller_set {id:tag, mode, op?, sp?}`. Backend `getattr(s,id)→None→return` no-ops unknown ids safely; same command activates the loop once that downstream unit is modelled. Dedicated faceplates (SIC, PIC-322203, HIC-322203/322602) unchanged, still take priority.

### 🧑 User

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   **Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Python FastAPI/WebSocket backend (physics, mass balance, control loops) + HTML/CSS/JS frontend (DCS mimic). Build strictly **ONE UNIT at a time**; do not anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

   **Rev 2 UI design (locked):** Cleaned DCS screenshot = `.screen` `background-image` (stretched `background-size:100% 100%`); live transmitter values/icons overlaid at stage pixel coords via fractional mapping. Unbound transmitters = WHITE FRAMES. STAGE_W=1366, STAGE_H=720.

   **Requests handled THIS session in order:**
   - (Resumed) Complete the 5-part work-order: Item 2 HV-322602 placement on 322-2; Item 3 equipment-tag nav buttons switch screens; Item 4 generate screen-322-1 UI + bind tags; Item 5 CO2 feed line mapping (FT-322403, FY-322403, TI-322017, XV-322902, PV-322203, PIC-322203, HIC-322203, Load) + "Register added tags".
   - `All controllers "*ic-3*****" should show faceplate when clicked` — every PIC/HIC/LIC/TIC/FIC/SIC controller with a 3xxxxx number must pop a faceplate.
   - `the faceplate generated should have "MAN," "AUTO", "CAS" buttons to switch between controlling modes, "MAN" to control the valve's opening manually, "AUTO" the valve opening will change automatically to adjust the controlled parameter to the set SP. "CAS" to let another parameter control the valve`
   - `Arrange the top bar screen names alphabetically`
   - `Indicators present in more than 1 screen should display the same value in all screens` (CURRENT — fix designed, NOT YET APPLIED).

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons. `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked DOM. overlays.js auto-appends `.ov-layer`.
   - Overlay types: `ind` (indicator; unbound=white frame=`.empty`), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve` (renders via ind branch since className ternary maps avalve→'ind'), `nav` (transparent screen-nav hotspot using `goto`,`w`,`h`).
   - Element fields: `{k,t,x,y,tag,bind,u,dec,cmd,id,fp,face,goto,w,h,def}`.
   - Faceplate dispatch in activate(): `o.face`→`window.OTS_FACE[o.face](o)` (generic registry: hic, hic2, pic, ctl); `o.fp`→`window.openFaceplate(o.fp)` (legacy SIC); then `CTRL_RE.test(o.tag)`→`window.OTS_FACE.ctl(o)` (generic controller fallback).
   - CTRL_RE = `/[A-Z]IC-3\d{2}/i` matches PIC/HIC/LIC/TIC/FIC/SIC-3xxxx controllers.
   - Generic ctl faceplate persists mode/SP/OP per tag in localStorage `ots_ctl_v1`; sends `controller_set {id:tag, mode, op?, sp?}` (backend no-ops unknown id).
   - `window.OTS_LAST = s` exposed in OV_apply for faceplate live-value prefill.
   - Backend WS `/ws` flat+nested packet every 0.1s, host 127.0.0.1. Commands: pump_toggle, xv_toggle, ext_override, controller_set, ratio_set, co2_set, hic_set, hic2_set, pic_set.
   - CO2 feed model: $F_{feed}=F_{raw}(1-f_{vent})$; $f_{vent}=\frac{PV_{open}}{100}\times0.15$; $PV_{open}=\max(\text{HIC-322203},\text{PIC}_{op})$; $\text{Load\%}=\frac{F_{feed}}{54.618}\times100$.
   - HP ejector: $\mu = EJ\_MU \times \frac{EJ\_OPEN\_DES}{open_{eff}}$; decreasing HV-322602 opening → higher $\mu$ → more 322E003 suction.
   - Tag editor: localStorage `ots_ov_pos_v3` (positions) + `ots_ov_tags_v3` (add/edit/del); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides.

   - **`D:\Work\Urea Simulation\frontend\app.js`**
     - `send(...)` is the WS send fn (in scope for all IIFEs). `window.OTS_FACE` registry, `window.otsSwitchScreen`, `window.openFaceplate` (185), fp-apply sends `controller_set {type,id,mode}` (217-220).
     - ADDED pic IIFE (final, with null-omit bug fix):
       ```
       (function(){
         const m=document.getElementById('picModal'); if(!m) return;
         const pv=document.getElementById('pic-pv'), sp=document.getElementById('pic-sp'),
               op=document.getElementById('pic-op'), btn=document.getElementById('pic-set-btn'),
               cl=document.getElementById('pic-close'),
               mMan=document.getElementById('pic-man'), mAuto=document.getElementById('pic-auto');
         let mode='AUTO';
         const setMode=v=>{ mode=v; mMan.classList.toggle('active',v==='MAN'); mAuto.classList.toggle('active',v==='AUTO'); };
         mMan.onclick=()=>setMode('MAN'); mAuto.onclick=()=>setMode('AUTO');
         const open=()=>{ const c=(window.OTS_LAST||{}).CO2_FEED||{};
           if(pv) pv.value = c.PIC_322203!=null ? c.PIC_322203 : '';
           if(sp) sp.value = c.PIC_sp!=null ? c.PIC_sp : (c.PIC_322203!=null ? c.PIC_322203 : '');
           if(op) op.value = c.PIC_op!=null ? c.PIC_op : '';
           setMode(c.PIC_mode||'AUTO'); m.classList.add('show'); };
         const apply=()=>{ const o=parseFloat(op.value), p=parseFloat(sp.value);
           const msg={type:'pic_set', mode};        // omit null fields: backend float()s any present op/sp
           if(!isNaN(o)) msg.op=o; if(!isNaN(p)) msg.sp=p; send(msg); };
         btn.onclick=apply;
         window.OTS_FACE = Object.assign(window.OTS_FACE||{}, { pic: open });
         if(cl) cl.onclick=()=> m.classList.remove('show');
         m.addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target===m) m.classList.remove('show'); });
       })();
       ```
     - ADDED hic2 IIFE: opens #hic2Modal, prefills from `CO2_FEED.HIC_322203`, SET sends `{type:'hic2_set',value:v}`, registers `window.OTS_FACE.hic2`.
     - ADDED ctl IIFE (final MAN/AUTO/CAS version):
       ```
       (function(){
         const m=document.getElementById('ctlModal'); if(!m) return;
         const ttl=document.getElementById('ctl-title'), pv=document.getElementById('ctl-pv'),
               sp=document.getElementById('ctl-sp'), op=document.getElementById('ctl-op'),
               note=document.getElementById('ctl-note'), cl=document.getElementById('ctl-close');
         const btn=document.getElementById('ctl-set-btn'),
               bMan=document.getElementById('ctl-man'), bAuto=document.getElementById('ctl-auto'), bCas=document.getElementById('ctl-cas');
         const gp=(o,p)=> p.split('.').reduce((a,k)=> (a==null?a:a[k]), o);
         const CK='ots_ctl_v1';
         const load=()=>{ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CK))||{}; }catch(e){ return {}; } };
         const save=st=>{ try{ localStorage.setItem(CK, JSON.stringify(st)); }catch(e){} };
         let cur=null, mode='AUTO';
         const applyMode=v=>{
           mode=v;
           bMan.classList.toggle('active', v==='MAN');
           bAuto.classList.toggle('active', v==='AUTO');
           bCas.classList.toggle('active', v==='CAS');
           op.readOnly = (v!=='MAN');
           sp.readOnly = (v!=='AUTO');
           note.textContent =
             v==='MAN'  ? 'MAN — operator sets valve opening directly.' :
             v==='AUTO' ? 'AUTO — controller drives opening to hold SP.' :
                          'CAS — opening driven by a linked (cascade) parameter.';
         };
         const open=(o)=>{
           cur=o; ttl.textContent=o.tag;
           const v = o.bind ? gp(window.OTS_LAST||{}, o.bind) : null;
           pv.value = (v==null||v==='') ? '—' : (v + (o.u?(' '+o.u):''));
           const st=load()[o.tag]||{};
           sp.value = st.sp!=null ? st.sp : '';
           op.value = st.op!=null ? st.op : '';
           applyMode(st.mode||'AUTO');
           m.classList.add('show');
         };
         bMan.onclick =()=>applyMode('MAN');
         bAuto.onclick=()=>applyMode('AUTO');
         bCas.onclick =()=>applyMode('CAS');
         const apply=()=>{
           if(!cur) return;
           const st=load(), o=parseFloat(op.value), p=parseFloat(sp.value);
           st[cur.tag]={ mode, op:isNaN(o)?null:o, sp:isNaN(p)?null:p };
           save(st);
           const msg={type:'controller_set', id:cur.tag, mode};
           if(mode==='MAN'  && !isNaN(o)) msg.op=o;
           if(mode==='AUTO' && !isNaN(p)) msg.sp=p;
           send(msg);
         };
         btn.onclick=apply;
         window.OTS_FACE = Object.assign(window.OTS_FACE||{}, { ctl: open });
         if(cl) cl.onclick=()=> m.classList.remove('show');
         m.addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target===m) m.classList.remove('show'); });
       })();
       ```
     - MODIFIED buildTabs() (alphabetical sort):
       ```
       function buildTabs(){
         const bar=document.getElementById('tabbar'); if(!bar) return;
         const cur=document.querySelector('.screen.active');
         const num=sc=> (sc.dataset.label||sc.id).split(' ')[0];   // "322-2 HP SCRUBBER" -> "322-2"
         bar.innerHTML=[...document.querySelectorAll('.screen')]
           .sort((a,b)=> num(a).localeCompare(num(b), undefined, {numeric:true}))
           .map(sc=> `<button data-go="${sc.id}"${sc===cur?' class="active"':''}>${num(sc)}</button>`).join('');
         bar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=> b.onclick=()=> switchScreen(b.dataset.go));
       }
       ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **pic_set null crash:** Backend `pic_set` calls `float(cmd["op"])`/`float(cmd["sp"])` whenever the key is present. My first pic IIFE sent `{op:isNaN(o)?null:o, sp:isNaN(p)?null:p}` → `float(None)` TypeError on backend. FIXED by building msg conditionally: `const msg={type:'pic_set', mode}; if(!isNaN(o)) msg.op=o; if(!isNaN(p)) msg.sp=p;` so null fields are omitted. No user feedback; self-caught during backend verification.
   - No other errors; every `node --check overlays.js`/`node --check app.js` returned OK.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Verified backend `controller_set` safely returns on unknown id (`getattr(s,cid,None) is None: return`), so the generic controller faceplate can send `controller_set {id:tag,...}` for unmodelled loops without crashing; loop activates automatically once that unit is modelled. Generic faceplate persists operator intent locally (`ots_ctl_v1`) since unmodelled tags have no packet echo.
   - Scoping decision for screen-322-1: bound the 8 CO2 tags + FT-321401 + pumps 321P002A/B + SIC-321950/951 + N/C ratios (all genuinely modelled in unit 321 per guideline rule 4.1); left downstream 322 reactor/scrubber/condenser transmitters as white frames.
   - Tab sort uses `localeCompare(...,{numeric:true})` for natural order → 321-1, 322-1, 322-2.
   - **Current (Phase 5) — duplicate-indicator problem:** Diagnosed that tags appearing on multiple screens render a value on the screen where bound but a blank white-frame where seeded unbound (FT-322403 bound on 322-1 but white on 321-1; PT-329201 bound on 322-2 but white on 322-1; TT-322012 same). Solution designed but NOT yet applied.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Image-backed UI (Rev 2): cleaned screenshot as `background-image`; absolutely-positioned `.ov` overlay divs carry live values/icons. `.screen.shot > *:not(.ov-layer){display:none;}` hides baked DOM. overlays.js auto-appends `.ov-layer`.
   - Overlay types: `ind` (indicator; unbound=white frame=`.empty`), `pump`, `xv`, `avalve` (renders via ind branch since className ternary maps avalve→'ind'), `nav` (transparent screen-nav hotspot using `goto`,`w`,`h`).
   - Element fields: `{k,t,x,y,tag,bind,u,dec,cmd,id,fp,face,goto,w,h,def}`.
   - Faceplate dispatch in activate(): `o.face`→`window.OTS_FACE[o.face](o)` (generic registry: hic, hic2, pic, ctl); `o.fp`→`window.openFaceplate(o.fp)` (legacy SIC); then `CTRL_RE.test(o.tag)`→`window.OTS_FACE.ctl(o)` (generic controller fallback).
   - CTRL_RE = `/[A-Z]IC-3\d{2}/i` matches PIC/HIC/LIC/TIC/FIC/SIC-3xxxx controllers.
   - Generic ctl faceplate persists mode/SP/OP per tag in localStorage `ots_ctl_v1`; sends `controller_set {id:tag, mode, op?, sp?}` (backend no-ops unknown id).
   - `window.OTS_LAST = s` exposed in OV_apply for faceplate live-value prefill.
   - Backend WS `/ws` flat+nested packet every 0.1s, host 127.0.0.1. Commands: pump_toggle, xv_toggle, ext_override, controller_set, ratio_set, co2_set, hic_set, hic2_set, pic_set.
   - CO2 feed model: $F_{feed}=F_{raw}(1-f_{vent})$; $f_{vent}=\frac{PV_{open}}{100}\times0.15$; $PV_{open}=\max(\text{HIC-322203},\text{PIC}_{op})$; $\text{Load\%}=\frac{F_{feed}}{54.618}\times100$.
   - HP ejector: $\mu = EJ\_MU \times \frac{EJ\_OPEN\_DES}{open_{eff}}$; decreasing HV-322602 opening → higher $\mu$ → more 322E003 suction.
   - Tag editor: localStorage `ots_ov_pos_v3` (positions) + `ots_ov_tags_v3` (add/edit/del); `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides.

     - ADDED pic IIFE (final, with null-omit bug fix):
       ```
       (function(){
         const m=document.getElementById('picModal'); if(!m) return;
         const pv=document.getElementById('pic-pv'), sp=document.getElementById('pic-sp'),
               op=document.getElementById('pic-op'), btn=document.getElementById('pic-set-btn'),
               cl=document.getElementById('pic-close'),
               mMan=document.getElementById('pic-man'), mAuto=document.getElementById('pic-auto');
         let mode='AUTO';
         const setMode=v=>{ mode=v; mMan.classList.toggle('active',v==='MAN'); mAuto.classList.toggle('active',v==='AUTO'); };
         mMan.onclick=()=>setMode('MAN'); mAuto.onclick=()=>setMode('AUTO');
         const open=()=>{ const c=(window.OTS_LAST||{}).CO2_FEED||{};
           if(pv) pv.value = c.PIC_322203!=null ? c.PIC_322203 : '';
           if(sp) sp.value = c.PIC_sp!=null ? c.PIC_sp : (c.PIC_322203!=null ? c.PIC_322203 : '');
           if(op) op.value = c.PIC_op!=null ? c.PIC_op : '';
           setMode(c.PIC_mode||'AUTO'); m.classList.add('show'); };
         const apply=()=>{ const o=parseFloat(op.value), p=parseFloat(sp.value);
           const msg={type:'pic_set', mode};        // omit null fields: backend float()s any present op/sp
           if(!isNaN(o)) msg.op=o; if(!isNaN(p)) msg.sp=p; send(msg); };
         btn.onclick=apply;
         window.OTS_FACE = Object.assign(window.OTS_FACE||{}, { pic: open });
         if(cl) cl.onclick=()=> m.classList.remove('show');
         m.addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target===m) m.classList.remove('show'); });
       })();
       ```
     - ADDED hic2 IIFE: opens #hic2Modal, prefills from `CO2_FEED.HIC_322203`, SET sends `{type:'hic2_set',value:v}`, registers `window.OTS_FACE.hic2`.
     - ADDED ctl IIFE (final MAN/AUTO/CAS version):
       ```
       (function(){
         const m=document.getElementById('ctlModal'); if(!m) return;
         const ttl=document.getElementById('ctl-title'), pv=document.getElementById('ctl-pv'),
               sp=document.getElementById('ctl-sp'), op=document.getElementById('ctl-op'),
               note=document.getElementById('ctl-note'), cl=document.getElementById('ctl-close');
         const btn=document.getElementById('ctl-set-btn'),
               bMan=document.getElementById('ctl-man'), bAuto=document.getElementById('ctl-auto'), bCas=document.getElementById('ctl-cas');
         const gp=(o,p)=> p.split('.').reduce((a,k)=> (a==null?a:a[k]), o);
         const CK='ots_ctl_v1';
         const load=()=>{ try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CK))||{}; }catch(e){ return {}; } };
         const save=st=>{ try{ localStorage.setItem(CK, JSON.stringify(st)); }catch(e){} };
         let cur=null, mode='AUTO';
         const applyMode=v=>{
           mode=v;
           bMan.classList.toggle('active', v==='MAN');
           bAuto.classList.toggle('active', v==='AUTO');
           bCas.classList.toggle('active', v==='CAS');
           op.readOnly = (v!=='MAN');
           sp.readOnly = (v!=='AUTO');
           note.textContent =
             v==='MAN'  ? 'MAN — operator sets valve opening directly.' :
             v==='AUTO' ? 'AUTO — controller drives opening to hold SP.' :
                          'CAS — opening driven by a linked (cascade) parameter.';
         };
         const open=(o)=>{
           cur=o; ttl.textContent=o.tag;
           const v = o.bind ? gp(window.OTS_LAST||{}, o.bind) : null;
           pv.value = (v==null||v==='') ? '—' : (v + (o.u?(' '+o.u):''));
           const st=load()[o.tag]||{};
           sp.value = st.sp!=null ? st.sp : '';
           op.value = st.op!=null ? st.op : '';
           applyMode(st.mode||'AUTO');
           m.classList.add('show');
         };
         bMan.onclick =()=>applyMode('MAN');
         bAuto.onclick=()=>applyMode('AUTO');
         bCas.onclick =()=>applyMode('CAS');
         const apply=()=>{
           if(!cur) return;
           const st=load(), o=parseFloat(op.value), p=parseFloat(sp.value);
           st[cur.tag]={ mode, op:isNaN(o)?null:o, sp:isNaN(p)?null:p };
           save(st);
           const msg={type:'controller_set', id:cur.tag, mode};
           if(mode==='MAN'  && !isNaN(o)) msg.op=o;
           if(mode==='AUTO' && !isNaN(p)) msg.sp=p;
           send(msg);
         };
         btn.onclick=apply;
         window.OTS_FACE = Object.assign(window.OTS_FACE||{}, { ctl: open });
         if(cl) cl.onclick=()=> m.classList.remove('show');
         m.addEventListener('click', e=>{ if(e.target===m) m.classList.remove('show'); });
       })();
       ```
     - MODIFIED buildTabs() (alphabetical sort):
       ```
       function buildTabs(){
         const bar=document.getElementById('tabbar'); if(!bar) return;
         const cur=document.querySelector('.screen.active');
         const num=sc=> (sc.dataset.label||sc.id).split(' ')[0];   // "322-2 HP SCRUBBER" -> "322-2"
         bar.innerHTML=[...document.querySelectorAll('.screen')]
           .sort((a,b)=> num(a).localeCompare(num(b), undefined, {numeric:true}))
           .map(sc=> `<button data-go="${sc.id}"${sc===cur?' class="active"':''}>${num(sc)}</button>`).join('');
         bar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=> b.onclick=()=> switchScreen(b.dataset.go));
       }
       ```

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   **Overall project:** Custom Operator Training Simulator (OTS) for a Stamicarbon urea synthesis + granulation plant at `D:\Work\Urea Simulation`. Python FastAPI/WebSocket backend (`backend/main.py`, physics/mass-balance/control) + HTML/CSS/JS frontend (`frontend/index.html`, `app.js`, `overlays.js`; DCS mimic). Build strictly **ONE UNIT at a time**; never anticipate/code downstream units until instructed.

   **CURRENT MAJOR TASK (verbatim):** "322E001 HP Stripper mapping":
   - Feeds — Tube side: (1) Bottom feed CO2: `320K002` (BL, not registered) – `PIC-322203` – `FT-322403` – `TT-322017` – `XV-322902` – `322E001`. (2) Top feed: Urea Reactor `322R001` overflow: `322R001` – `TT-322014` – `HV-322605` – `322E001`. Shell side: 19.7 bara steam from `329D005` HP Steam Drum.
   - Products — Tube side: (1) Top gases `322E001` – `TT-322013` – `322E002`. (2) Bottom solution `322E001` – `TT-322004` – `LV-322501` – `TT-323001` – `323C003` Rectifying Column. Shell side: condensate to `329D005`.
   - "`LIC-322501` on the bottom of `322E001` controls solution level in the `322E001` by controlling the opening of `LV-322501` (Check its position in datasheet to derive control parameters)".
   - "Knowing the feed properties and composition, generate modelling equations on `322E001` and determine the feed properties and composition of the products. Compare the results with the products' feed properties and composition shared. If identical bind modelling equations to `322E001` and `LV-322501`. Register unregistered tags."

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Reduced steady-state stripper model (NOT 1D BVP shooting — too heavy for 0.1 s tick): component split-fraction model calibrated exact at design, strip fractions modulated by T/steam/CO2-strip-gas/pressure; non-volatiles (Urea, Biuret) → 100% bottom; inerts (N2, O2) → ~100% top gas.
   - Reactions in stripper: urea hydrolysis $\text{Urea} + H_2O \rightarrow 2NH_3 + CO_2$ (ξ ≈ 88 kmol/h at design) + biuret formation $2\,\text{Urea} \rightarrow \text{Biuret} + NH_3$ (ξ ≈ 0.667). Carbamate decomposition $NH_2COONH_4(l) \rightleftharpoons 2NH_3(aq) + CO_2(aq),\ \Delta H>0$ is represented implicitly as phase transfer of dissolved CO2/NH3 (no component-total mole change).
   - Per-stream composition basis differs; detect by matching stated MW: top gas MOL%, stream 207 MASS%, LV gas MOL%, LV liquid MASS%.
   - LIC-322501 level control: level integrator $dm/dt = \dot m_{L,in} - \dot m_{L,out}$; LV-322501 opening sets $\dot m_{L,out}$ via Cv; AUTO holds level SP.
   - Existing backend patterns: `Controller` class (MAN/AUTO/CAS, `set_mode`, `step`), `PID` class, `clamp`, `DT=0.1`, `MW_COMP` dict, `State` class, `step_sim`, packet build, `handle_cmd`.
   - Frontend (Rev 2): image-backed overlays; `OV[screenId]` config arrays; element fields `{k,t,x,y,tag,bind,u,dec,cmd,id,fp,face,goto,w,h,def}`; types `ind`/`pump`/`xv`/`avalve`/`nav`; unbound `ind` = white frame (`.empty`); faceplate dispatch via `o.face`→`OTS_FACE[...]`, `o.fp`→`openFaceplate`, `CTRL_RE=/[A-Z]IC-3\d{2}/i`→`OTS_FACE.ctl`; tag editor localStorage `ots_ov_pos_v3`/`ots_ov_tags_v3`; `cfg(sid)` merges seed+overrides.

   - **`HP STRIPPER 322E001.md`** and **`LV-322501.md`** (read full). Stripper 1D BVP modelling equations (preserve verbatim per Mathematical Fidelity rule):
     - Liquid species: $\frac{d(\dot{m}_L x_i)}{dz} = \left( r_i M_{w,i} \frac{\pi D^2}{4} \epsilon_L \right) - J_i \pi D$
     - Gas species (counter-current): $-\frac{d(\dot{m}_G y_i)}{dz} = J_i \pi D$
     - Mass-transfer flux: $J_i = K_{G,i} M_{w,i} (P_{i}^* - P_{i, bulk})$
     - Liquid energy: $\frac{d(\dot{m}_L h_L)}{dz} = U \pi D (T_{steam} - T_L) - \sum_{i} (J_i \Delta H_{vap,i}) + \left( \sum r_j \Delta H_{rxn,j} \right) \frac{\pi D^2}{4} \epsilon_L$
     - Gas energy: $-\frac{d(\dot{m}_G h_G)}{dz} = h_c \pi D (T_L - T_G) + \sum_{i} (J_i h_{i,vap})$
     - Boundary conditions split: liquid known at $z=0$ (top), gas (CO2) known at $z=L$ (bottom); requires shooting/orthogonal collocation. Liquid outlet T ≈ 205-210°C; shell steam condensing.

## Bound modelling equations

Component molar feed (kmol/h), live CO₂ scale $\sigma = \dot m_{CO_2}/54.618$:
$$\dot n_{i,\text{feed}} = \dot n_{i,207} + y_{i,CO_2}\,\dot N_{CO_2,des}\,\sigma$$

Reactions (extents scale with steam heat $\eta_T=T_{steam}/214$):
$$\text{Urea}+\text{H}_2\text{O}\rightarrow 2\text{NH}_3+\text{CO}_2,\quad \xi_{hyd}=88.1\,\eta_T$$
$$2\,\text{Urea}\rightarrow\text{Biuret}+\text{NH}_3,\quad \xi_{biu}=0.667\,\eta_T$$
$$\dot n_{i,\text{avail}}=\dot n_{i,\text{feed}}+\sum_j \nu_{ij}\xi_j$$

Carbamate decomposition $\mathrm{NH_2COONH_4(l)\rightleftharpoons 2NH_3(aq)+CO_2(aq)}$, $\Delta H>0$ — implicit in the dissolved-phase split (no component mole change).

Split to top gas, modulated fraction:
$$f_i=\mathrm{clamp}\!\big(f_{i,des}\cdot\eta_T\,\eta_{CO_2}\,\eta_P,\;0,\;0.999\big),\quad \eta_{CO_2}=0.5+0.5\sigma,\quad \eta_P=2-\tfrac{P}{144}$$
$$\dot n_{i,top}=f_i\,\dot n_{i,\text{avail}},\qquad \dot n_{i,bot}=(1-f_i)\,\dot n_{i,\text{avail}}$$
$f_{i,des}$: NH₃ 0.8546, CO₂ 0.8606, H₂O 0.1313, N₂ 0.9987, O₂ 0.975, Urea=Biuret=0.

**LV-322501** (linear char, FC, flashing-calibrated):
$$\dot m_{drain}=\dot m_{bot,des}\,\frac{\text{OP}}{82}\sqrt{\frac{P-P_{down}}{139.8}}$$

**LIC-322501** bottom-sump level, direct-acting (level↑→OP↑→drain↑):
$$\frac{dm}{dt}=\dot m_{bot,in}-\dot m_{drain},\quad L\%=\frac{m}{A_{sump}H_{span}\rho}\cdot100,\quad \text{OP}=\text{OP}+K_I(L-L_{sp})\,dt$$

## Debug Report: LIC-322501 limit-cycle oscillation

### Reproduction
- **Expected**: bottom-sump level settles at SP (50 %); LV-322501 settles where drain = inflow.
- **Actual**: sustained oscillation — level 49.3↔50.4 %, LV 82.8↔95.9 %, drain 131↔152 t/h, inflow constant 141.66. Never settled.
- **Steps**: design hold 60 s, step CO₂ 54.6→45 t/h, run 600 s.

### Root Cause
LIC-322501 was **pure-integral** (`op += KI·(L−SP)·dt`). Level is itself an **integrating process** ($dm/dt = \dot m_{in}-\dot m_{out}$). Pure-I controller + integrating plant = two cascaded integrators → loop phase ≈ −180° at the gain crossover → marginal stability → limit cycle. Integrating processes need **proportional-dominant** control.

### Fix
Velocity-form **PI**, direct-acting; P term supplies phase lead:
$$\Delta\text{OP}=K_c\Big[(e_k-e_{k-1})+\tfrac{dt}{T_i}\,e_k\Big],\quad e=L-L_{sp},\ K_c=2.5,\ T_i=90\text{ s}$$
- `LIC_322501_KI` → `LIC_322501_KC=2.5`, `LIC_322501_TI=90`.
- Added `e_prev` state (bumpless MAN→AUTO: tracked every tick).

### Prevention
- Rule for project instructions: **level/integrating loops must carry proportional action** — never pure-I.
- Add regression check: step inflow ±10 %, assert level returns to SP±0.2 % and |drain−inflow|<0.5 % within 300 s with no sign reversals in OP.

2. **Key Technical Concepts:**
   - **Reduced steady-state stripper model** (component split-fraction, NOT 1D BVP shooting): calibrated EXACT at design HMB; strip fractions modulated by steam-T, CO2-strip-gas ratio, pressure; non-volatiles (Urea,Biuret)→100% bottom; inerts (N2,O2)→~100% top.
   - **Stripper reactions:** urea hydrolysis Urea+H₂O→2NH₃+CO₂ (ξ_hyd=88.1 kmol/h design); biuret formation 2 Urea→Biuret+NH₃ (ξ_biu=0.667). Carbamate decomposition NH₂COONH₄(l)⇌2NH₃(aq)+CO₂(aq), ΔH>0, implicit in dissolved-phase split (no component mole change).
   - **Integrating-process control insight (from debug):** liquid level IS an integrator (dm/dt). Pure-integral controller on an integrating process = two cascaded integrators ≈ −180° loop phase → limit cycle. Level loops MUST be proportional-dominant (P or velocity-PI), never pure-I.
   - **LIC-322501 direct-acting** on FC (fail-closed) air-to-open LV-322501: level↑→OP↑→valve opens→drain↑→level↓ = correct negative feedback. (Standard reverse-acting `e=sp−pv` PID would run away on an outlet valve.)
   - **LV-322501 flashing service:** textbook Kv eq ($Q=K_v\sqrt{\Delta P/SG}$) over-predicts ~3× at full ΔP (143.7→4.2 bar); the two datasheet operating points (82%→114.58 m³/h, 90%→126.1 m³/h) are LINEAR, so flow modelled linear-in-opening anchored at design with mild √(ΔP) coupling.
   - **Per-stream composition basis differs:** top gas = MOL%, bottom solution = MASS%.
   - **Backend patterns:** dict-based controllers (PIC_322203, now LIC_322501) `{mode,op,sp,pv,...}`; Controller/PID classes (%-based); `clamp()`, `DT=0.1`, `MW_COMP`, `State`, `step_sim(dt)`, packet `return {...}`, `handle_cmd(cmd)`, design-anchored equipment blocks returning comp+props dicts.
